title: Classic Improvements ADD-ON 7 Origins
description: This removes or try's to remove any tweaks done in Classic Improvements
body:
# Classic Improvements ADD-ON 7

### IF YOUR LOOKING FOR CLASSIC IMPROVEMENTS [HERE](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classicimprovements)

#### What is this doing 

This is removes or trys to remove any tweaks done to Classic improvements some examples are

+ Dynamic Redstone 

+ Tweaks done to stone/ Deepslate bricks 

+ Furnace animation 

+ Custom cod to old fish 

## NOTES

No mods are needed 

## Download 

[Classic Improvements](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classicimprovements)
